description: A realistic small wild rabbit standing neutrally on all four feet, nose to tail-base body length about 0.35m, ears upright, head level, tail down. Compact rounded body, long upright ears, short fluffy tail, powerful hind legs, small forelegs. Mottled brown/grey-brown fur on body and back, lighter cream/off-white underbelly and inner ears, darker brown shading on ear tips and back. Matte short-fur texture with subtle normal detail, no shine, no fur strand geometry. Neutral standing rest pose, centered, no accessories, no clothing, no anthropomorphism.
style: realistic low-to-mid poly 3D game asset, desaturated muted natural wildlife palette matching an overgrown industrial facility environment, matte non-glossy PBR fur material with subtle normal map, small specular highlight on eyes only, consistent fidelity and shading approach with a companion deer creature asset
